summary: ICAI doesn't automatically upload evaluated answer sheets on SSP, despite being a digital platform
analysis.pain_point: Manual process for uploading evaluated answer sheets
analysis.zetaris_relevance: Low relevance — This is a specific problem related to a digital platform, but it's not directly related to data integration or a data fabric.

data warehouse consolidation.title: The CDP-CEP Architecture Decision: How to Choose the Right Pattern — Part 2 | by Andrea Veggiani | Jun, 2026 - Medium
data warehouse consolidation.text: The CDP-CEP Architecture Decision: How to Choose the Right Pattern — Part 2 | by Andrea Veggiani | Jun, 2026  Medium

summary: Article discusses CDP-CEP architecture patterns for event-driven systems, focusing on choosing the right pattern for a specific use case.
Author Andrea Veggiani provides a decision tree to help architects select the most suitable pattern.
The article is part of a series, with the first part covering the basics of CDP-CEP and the importance of event-driven architecture.
analysis.pain_point: Not directly relevant to data integration
analysis.zetaris_relevance: Low relevance — This article is focused on event-driven architecture patterns and does not mention data silos, data quality, or data governance.

data warehouse consolidation.title: The End of ETL: Open-Source pg_lake Unifies Postgres and the Lakehouse - YouTube
data warehouse consolidation.text: The End of ETL: Open-Source pg_lake Unifies Postgres and the Lakehouse  YouTube

summary: The End of ETL: Open-Source pg_lake Unifies Postgres and the Lakehouse
pg_lake is an open-source project that integrates Postgres with the lakehouse architecture
It aims to reduce the need for ETL processes and unify data across different systems
analysis.pain_point: Data silos across Postgres and lakehouse architecture
analysis.zetaris_relevance: Low relevance — This article discusses an open-source project that unifies Postgres and the lakehouse, which is a different approach to data integration than Zetaris's federated query engine and semantic layer.
